title: apicra mirabilis
intro: Apicra mirabilis, also known as the Desert Marigold or Clary Sage, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Apicra mirabilis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, promote relaxation, and improve respiratory issues. Apicra mirabilis can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb for use in various herbal remedies.
